summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented. REQ-1 (floor count at 1) is implemented in ChatArea.tsx using Math.max(1, rawActiveUserCount). REQ-3 (remove 'online' text) is implemented in ChatArea.tsx per the file summary. REQ-2 (immediate heartbeat on join) is referenced in ChatroomPage.tsx via useHeartbeat and useGetActiveUserCount, with the file summary confirming the immediate heartbeat behavior.
